many_users.description:i18n: Determines if your site is optimized for small or large sites. In environments with a lot of users it can be very slow or impossible to build a list all users. This option tunes the user interface and behaviour for this case by allowing you to search for users instead of listing all of them.

many_groups.description:i18n: Determines if your site is optimized for small or large sites. In environments with a lot of groups it can be very slow or impossible to build a list all groups. This option tunes the user interface and behaviour for this case by allowing you to search for groups instead of listing all of them.
